name: Thai Rubber Latex Group Public Company Limited
summary: Thai Rubber Latex Group Public Company Limited manufactures and sells rubber and latex products in Thailand, the People's Republic of China, Islamic Republic of Pakistan, Malaysia, the Republic of Korea, and internationally. It operates through three segments: Concentrated and Prevulcanized Latex; Latex Products; and Rubber Plantation. The company produces and distributes products from natural rubber, rubber threads, and foam latex mattresses and pillows. It also trades in products from natural rubber. The company was formerly known as Thai Rubber Latex Corporation (Thailand) Public Company Limited and changed its name to Thai Rubber Latex Group Public Company Limited in July 2019. Thai Rubber Latex Group Public Company Limited was incorporated in 1985 and is headquartered in Bang Phli, Thailand.
